TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu ťÉ®ŤźĹś¶āś≥ĀŤąášĹćÁĹģ == qalang kbanun hiya qani ga, ssaying maki qszyap na lluyung minus, knbawiq nya ga, ski kmwah magan kbhul mspat pgan, haring ryax na hlangan Ipun ga mnwah tqalang naki cqani, kmut khoniq cyunga ru pslyan khoniq qalang naha hani, knian na aki kisya cyunga, blaq calay qaxan naha, mehong nya lga uka sexu ini swan naha kmut khoniq ro ng_yut photaw qabax pintyawun naha la, piyux cquliq (thelu ru kahat), musa naha la, musa Hiran ini ga hogan la, mwani lga nanaq pthay ita Tayal maki cqani mqyanux mlahang zhiyal ta nanaq. . sinllwan lalu qalang ŚúįŚźćÁĒĪšĺÜ alang Kbanun qani hiya ga, sraral ga son ta Mnoyan, knahul ta qalang Mnoyan mnwah cqani, ro ryax na kinlhangan na Gipun ga iyugun naha lalu son maha Kbanun, imi na cinllwan nya ga, cyan maki qutux pinqiyon, nanu ga sraral kian qani ga, maki piyux panan, penan ga qutux mehong nya lga, bnheci ta si soy Kbanun la, baha hmswa iugun qoyeq qani, ini ta baqiy uzi, siga lungun ta nanaq cwa maha kya. ťÉ®ŤźĹšĽ•ŚČćŤąäÁāļMnoyan, Kbanun, Kbanun, . pinqzyuwan qalang ťÉ®ŤźĹťĀ∑Śĺô Pinsbkan -Quri sqabu -ś≤ŅŤĎóTuruy kacing ŚĪĪŤÉĆšłčŚąá-Á∂ďHbun qyus -gong Matang -hbun Talah (ŚŹąÁ®Īsgmi)- .šłÄťÉ®ŚąÜšļļŚČćŚĺÄMnoyan -Skikun -Kbanun
S.PHON: == mwani mis~…ēuw qalaŇč ru ¶~ ®jux te inu ******* == qalaŇč kő≤anun ńßija qani …£a, s~…ēs~…ēajiŇč maki qs~…ēzjap na llujuŇč minus~…ē, knő≤awiq nja …£a, s~…ēki kmwańß ma…£an kő≤ńßul ms~…ēpat p…£an, ńßariŇč rjax na ńßlaŇčan ipun …£a mnwańß tqalaŇč naki ¶~ ®qani, kmut kńßoniq ¶~ ®juŇča ru ps~…ēljan kńßoniq qalaŇč nańßa ńßani, knian na aki kis~…ēja ¶~ ®juŇča, ő≤laq ¶~ ®alaj qaxan nańßa, meńßoŇč nja l…£a uka s~…ēexu ini s~…ēwan nańßa kmut kńßoniq ro Ňč…ôjut pńßotaw qaő≤ax pintjawun nańßa la, pijux ¶~ ®quliq (tńßelu ru kańßat), mus~…ēa nańßa la, mus~…ēa ńßiran ini …£a ńßo…£an la, mwani l…£a nanaq ptńßaj ita tajal maki ¶~ ®qani mqjanux mlańßaŇč zńßijal ta nanaq. . s~…ēinllwan lalu qalaŇč **** alaŇč kő≤anun qani ńßija …£a, s~…ēraral …£a s~…ēon ta mnojan, knańßul ta qalaŇč mnojan mnwańß ¶~ ®qani, ro rjax na kinlńßaŇčan na …£ipun …£a iju…£un nańßa lalu s~…ēon mańßa kő≤anun, imi na ¶~ ®inllwan nja …£a, ¶~ ®jan maki qutux pinqijon, nanu …£a s~…ēraral kian qani …£a, maki pijux panan, penan …£a qutux meńßoŇč nja l…£a, ő≤nńße ¶~ ®i ta s~…ēi s~…ēoj kő≤anun la, ő≤ańßa ńßms~…ēwa iu…£un qojeq qani, ini ta ő≤aqij uzi, s~…ēi…£a luŇčun ta nanaq ¶~ ®wa mańßa kja. ******mnojan, kő≤anun, kő≤anun, . pinqzjuwan qalaŇč **** pins~…ēő≤kan -quri s~…ēqaő≤u -**turuj ka ¶~ ®iŇč ****-*ńßő≤un qjus~…ē -…£oŇč mataŇč -ńßő≤un talańß (**s~…ē…£mi)- .******mnojan -s~…ēkikun -kő≤anun
S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu ťÉ®ŤźĹś¶āś≥ĀŤąášĹćÁĹģ == qalang kbanun hiya qani ga, ssaying maki qszyap na lluyung minus, knbawiq nya ga, ski kmwah magan kbhul mspat pgan, haring ryax na hlangan Ipun ga mnwah tqalang naki cqani, kmut khoniq cyunga ru pslyan khoniq qalang naha hani, knian na aki kisya cyunga, blaq calay qaxan naha, mehong nya lga uka sexu ini swan naha kmut khoniq ro ng_yut photaw qabax pintyawun naha la, piyux cquliq (thelu ru kahat), musa naha la, musa Hiran ini ga hogan la, mwani lga nanaq pthay ita Tayal maki cqani mqyanux mlahang zhiyal ta nanaq. . sinllwan lalu qalang ŚúįŚźćÁĒĪšĺÜ alang Kbanun qani hiya ga, sraral ga son ta Mnoyan, knahul ta qalang Mnoyan mnwah cqani, ro ryax na kinlhangan na Gipun ga iyugun naha lalu son maha Kbanun, imi na cinllwan nya ga, cyan maki qutux pinqiyon, nanu ga sraral kian qani ga, maki piyux panan, penan ga qutux mehong nya lga, bnheci ta si soy Kbanun la, baha hmswa iugun qoyeq qani, ini ta baqiy uzi, siga lungun ta nanaq cwa maha kya. ťÉ®ŤźĹšĽ•ŚČćŤąäÁāļMnoyan, Kbanun, Kbanun, . pinqzyuwan qalang ťÉ®ŤźĹťĀ∑Śĺô Pinsbkan -Quri sqabu -ś≤ŅŤĎóTuruy kacing ŚĪĪŤÉĆšłčŚąá-Á∂ďHbun qyus -gong Matang -hbun Talah (ŚŹąÁ®Īsgmi)- .šłÄťÉ®ŚąÜšļļŚČćŚĺÄMnoyan -Skikun -Kbanun
S.PHON: == mwani mis~…ēuw qalaŇč ru ¶~ ®jux te inu ******* == qalaŇč kő≤anun ńßija qani …£a, s~…ēs~…ēajiŇč maki qs~…ēzjap na llujuŇč minus~…ē, knő≤awiq nja …£a, s~…ēki kmwańß ma…£an kő≤ńßul ms~…ēpat p…£an, ńßariŇč rjax na ńßlaŇčan ipun …£a mnwańß tqalaŇč naki ¶~ ®qani, kmut kńßoniq ¶~ ®juŇča ru ps~…ēljan kńßoniq qalaŇč nańßa ńßani, knian na aki kis~…ēja ¶~ ®juŇča, ő≤laq ¶~ ®alaj qaxan nańßa, meńßoŇč nja l…£a uka s~…ēexu ini s~…ēwan nańßa kmut kńßoniq ro Ňč…ôjut pńßotaw qaő≤ax pintjawun nańßa la, pijux ¶~ ®quliq (tńßelu ru kańßat), mus~…ēa nańßa la, mus~…ēa ńßiran ini …£a ńßo…£an la, mwani l…£a nanaq ptńßaj ita tajal maki ¶~ ®qani mqjanux mlańßaŇč zńßijal ta nanaq. . s~…ēinllwan lalu qalaŇč **** alaŇč kő≤anun qani ńßija …£a, s~…ēraral …£a s~…ēon ta mnojan, knańßul ta qalaŇč mnojan mnwańß ¶~ ®qani, ro rjax na kinlńßaŇčan na …£ipun …£a iju…£un nańßa lalu s~…ēon mańßa kő≤anun, imi na ¶~ ®inllwan nja …£a, ¶~ ®jan maki qutux pinqijon, nanu …£a s~…ēraral kian qani …£a, maki pijux panan, penan …£a qutux meńßoŇč nja l…£a, ő≤nńße ¶~ ®i ta s~…ēi s~…ēoj kő≤anun la, ő≤ańßa ńßms~…ēwa iu…£un qojeq qani, ini ta ő≤aqij uzi, s~…ēi…£a luŇčun ta nanaq ¶~ ®wa mańßa kja. ******mnojan, kő≤anun, kő≤anun, . pinqzjuwan qalaŇč **** pins~…ēő≤kan -quri s~…ēqaő≤u -**turuj ka ¶~ ®iŇč ****-*ńßő≤un qjus~…ē -…£oŇč mataŇč -ńßő≤un talańß (**s~…ē…£mi)- .******mnojan -s~…ēkikun -kő≤anun
